resources.string:
Photo Manager
 An Android practice project for learning and development.

 Main Features:
 • Browse all local photos on your device
 • Filter photos by creation date
 • Photo editing

 Version: 1.0.0
 Author: Haonan Zhu
 e-mail: a987029855@hotmail.com
 GitHub: https://github.com/ZHN239
 Development Environment: Android Studio

 ⚠️ Note: This app is for educational use only. Commercial use is prohibited.
